sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ صَلَاحٌ طَبَّاخًا فِي مَطْعَمٍ صَغِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Salah radi kao kuhar u malom restoranu.
sentences.translationEn: Salah works as a cook in a small restaurant.

sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ عَمَلَهُ فِي التَّاسِعَةِ صَبَاحًا وَيُحَضِّرُ الطَّعَامَ.
sentences.translation: Počinje posao u devet ujutro i priprema hranu.
sentences.translationEn: He starts work at nine in the morning and prepares food.
He cooks soup, rice, and meat.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ يَوْمَ الْجُمْعَةِ لِأَنَّ الْمَطْعَمَ يَمْتَلِئُ بِالزَّبَائِنِ.
sentences.translation: Voli petak jer se restoran puni gostima.
sentences.translationEn: He loves Friday because the restaurant fills up with customers.
